final:
module down_counter_8
(
  input rst,
  input clk,

  output reg [7:0] count
);

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge rst or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (rst) 
	begin
      count <= 8'b11111111;
    end 
	else 
	begin
      if (count == 8'b00000000) 
	  begin
        count <= 8'b11111111;
      end 
	  else 
	  begin
        count <= count - 1;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
